location.name: Praia do Porto do Seixal
location.summary: A black-sand beach on the north coast, surrounded by green mountains and waterfalls.
location.imageAlt: Black sand beach at Seixal on Madeira
location.mapQuery: Praia do Porto do Seixal Madeira

article.intro: Praia do Porto do Seixal is a scenic north-coast beach framed by steep green mountains.
article.history: The beach is part of Seixal’s volcanic coastline, where dark sand and rocks contrast strongly with the surrounding vegetation.
highlights: Dark volcanic sand and dramatic green surroundings
A photogenic stop on a west or north-coast drive
article.practicalTip: Sea conditions can change quickly on the north coast; follow local guidance before entering the water.
